Entries.Introduction: I apologize for such a...rough...first impression, @.$2#$b#I promise I'm feeling okay now, though.#$b#Please, feel free to visit sometime. I'll be sure to prepare a cup of tea next time.$1
Entries.cc_Begin: So, you can see the Junimos too...$1#$b#I had a feeling you were special when we met, @.
Entries.cc_Bus: My friends told me about the run-down bus to the desert.#$b#I've never been there before...I would love to visit one day.
Entries.cc_Greenhouse: %revealtaste:{{ModID}}_Aelin:(0)376Hehe, my friends seem to have given you a special gift.$1#$b#A greenhouse to grow anything you want...you could grow as many poppies as you like.
Entries.pamHouseUpgrade: I heard from my friends that someone gave Ms. Pam a new home.#$b#You wouldn't know anything about that, would you, @?$1
Entries.pamHouseUpgradeAnonymous: I heard from my friends that someone gave Ms. Pam a new home.#$b#You wouldn't know anything about that, would you, @?$1
Entries.railroadEarthquake: Did you feel that rumbling last night, @?#$b#It was quite faint here, but it knocked my favorite teacup off of the shelf...$2
Entries.jojaMartStruckByLightning: I heard an awful crashing sound in the night, as though the skies opened in anger...$2#$b#No one in the village was hurt, right?$2
Entries.babyBoy: So you're a father^mother^parent now, @! And with a healthy baby boy!$1#$b#May the spirits of nature bless your child with an abundance of good fortune for many years to come!$1
Entries.babyGirl: So you're a father^mother^parent now, @! And with a healthy baby girl!$1#$b#May the spirits of nature bless your child with an abundance of good fortune for many years to come!$1
Entries.LucikielArrives: I felt a most ghastly presence from the village...$2#$b#I've only felt this presence once in the past. That horrible, wicked demon...$3
Entries.ReputationIncreased: Perhaps I was mistaken...perhaps demons aren't all wicked, after all.$2
Entries.SpouseStardrop: @, my beloved, you've been working so hard nonstop, and you've been nothing but kind to me...$4#$b#I know it isn't much, but...please, accept this token of my love for you.$1
Entries.FlowerDance_Accept_Spouse: Hehe, is this your way of asking me for a dance?$1#$b#I'd be honored, my beloved.
Entries.FlowerDance_Accept: It's a rather important tradition for the people here...I'd be glad to participate.$1
Entries.FlowerDance_Decline: Ah...I'm sorry, I'm not much for dancing.$2
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)StardropTea: Oh, my...! What a pleasant aroma, and the color...$2#$b#Ahh...it's delicious, and so very soothing. My entire body feels as if it's floating...$2
Entries.spring_23: There's quite a commotion in the forest today...$2#$b#O-oh! The Flower Dance...I'd completely forgotten what day it is.

Entries.~NPCNAME~: {{Random: Hi, @! Wow, you're wet! && Hiya, @. We're staying inside today. I get bad-scrungy when I'm wet. && I'm protecting Jean today! Scary thunder can't get me!$h && Lots of people get sad when it rains. If you have time, maybe visit some people for us?$h && It's dark right now, but I'm sure there will be more sunbeams.$h |inputSeparator=&&}}
